name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> idle]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = idle
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = \@]
    /\ state[i] = trying
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = \@]
    /\ state[i] = critical
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = \@]
    /\ state[i] = idle

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
   /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] \in {idle, trying, critical}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
THINKING == 0
HUNGRY == 1
EATING == 2

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = THINKING
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![LEFT(i)] = 1]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = HUNGRY]
  \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = EATING
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]
  \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = HUNGRY
        /\ forks[i] = 1
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 1
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
        /\ forks' = forks

(* Invariant: No two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..1]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N :
                states[i] = EATING
                => forks[i] = 1 /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 1
          /\ \A i \in 1..N :
                forks[i] = 1
                => states[i] = HUNGRY \/ states[i] = EATING
          /\ \A i \in 1..N :
                forks[i] = 0
                => states[i] = THINKING \/ states[i] = HUNGRY

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                 /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                 /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max([num[j] | j \in 1..N]) + 1]
                 /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ size < K
      /\ head' = head
         /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
         /\ size' = size + 1
         /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ size > 0
      /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
         /\ tail' = tail
         /\ size' = size - 1
         /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ state' = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
      \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
      \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
      \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
      \/ /\ state = "Leader"
          /\ state' = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES chunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) \in CHUNK_SIZE .. Append(file, i)]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Last(chunks))
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ chunks' = Tail(chunks)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[i])]
        /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag'[1] = FALSE
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag'[2] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init ==
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next ==
  /\ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
       /\ p \in free
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
       /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
       /\ p \in allocated[c]
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
       /\ free' = free \cup {p}

TypeOK ==
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq free'

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == /\ turn' \in {0,1}
        /\ wants' \in {0,1}^2
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        /\ turn' = 1 - turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

(* --state Increment
counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]
*)

(* --state Merge
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] ELSE Max(counts[][m])]]
*)

(* --type invariants
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)

(* --specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
*)

(* --state variables
vars == <<counts>>
*)

(* --initial state
Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --next-state relation
Next == 
  \/ \E n \in Node : 
       counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]]
  \/ \E n \in Node : 
       counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] ELSE Max(counts[][m])]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>
*)

(* --global count
GlobalCount == Sum(counts[][n])  (* Sum over all nodes n *)
*)

(* --temporal property
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
*)

(* --configuration
CONSTANT Node
*)

====
